item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n06","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response gives a direct initial verdict, but it treats the third issue as enough to trigger a process/root-cause review and advises pausing further patches.
